narrative:
Norwood 2-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,052 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
